description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker with a bold, futuristic design, featuring a combination of metallic silver, matte black, and mustard yellow panels. The upper is constructed from synthetic materials with a glossy finish, accented by angular overlays and a prominent skull emblem on the lateral side. The shoe has a thick, sculpted sole with deep grooves and a two-tone color scheme, providing both visual impact and functional grip. The lacing system is traditional, with mustard yellow laces threading through reinforced eyelets, and the tongue and collar are padded for comfort. Branding elements, including 'RTFKT' text, are visible on the heel and tongue, while the interior appears cushioned and lined for support. The overall construction suggests durability and style, suitable for urban environments and streetwear fashion.
description: A high-top, metallic silver and mustard yellow sneaker with bold black accents, angular overlays, and prominent branding. Features a thick, sculpted sole and a traditional lacing system.
description_view_0: Side view showing the skull emblem, angular overlays, and the 'RTFKT' branding on the heel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the mustard yellow laces, perforated toe box, and padded tongue with branding.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the layered panel construction and sculpted sole details.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring the 'RTFKT' branding across the heel strap and padded collar.
attribute_logo: Skull emblem on lateral side in black; 'RTFKT' text on heel and tongue in black.
